Non-functional requirements missing — no performance targets, security standards, accessibility compliance (WCAG level), offline support strategy
No analytics events or success metrics defined for any feature — cannot measure product success or iterate
Security requirements absent — GDPR compliance, PCI-DSS scope, data retention policies, PII handling procedures
Localization and internationalization unspecified — supported languages, currency handling, timezone display rules

Define notification matrix: push vs email vs SMS, triggered by which events, with user preference controls and opt-out mechanisms
Specify Provider Portal features separately from consumer app — business hours management, service catalog CRUD, staff/resource management, booking calendar view, revenue dashboard

Add explicit security requirements: GDPR compliance for EU users, PCI-DSS scope for payments, data retention policies, PII handling
Define offline behavior and sync strategy for mobile app — what functionality works without connectivity, conflict resolution for bookings made offline
Include localization and internationalization requirements — supported languages, currency handling, timezone display rules
Specify accessibility requirements: WCAG level, screen reader support, minimum touch target sizes, color contrast ratios
Add explicit success metrics and analytics events for each feature to enable data-driven iteration

Define Background Jobs (BullMQ) specifications: specific job types (booking reminders, payment reconciliation, review moderation), retry policies, queue separation strategy, dead letter queue handling

suggestions: Produce complete architecture.md with: C4 diagrams (Context, Container, Component), explicit service boundaries with API contracts, full database schema with Prisma models, monorepo folder structure with Nx workspace configuration
Define API contract using tRPC with Zod schemas for end-to-end type safety between React Native and NestJS, with OpenAPI 3.0 export for external consumers

Design Availability & Slot Computation as dedicated bounded context: RFC 5545/iCalendar recurrence rules, exception patterns (overrides, cancellations), resource allocation model, and slot generation algorithm with O(n) complexity guarantees
Create explicit Prisma schema with PostGIS extensions (geography type, spatial indexes), full-text search (tsvector/tsquery), and proper indexing strategy
Design Redis usage: session cache (TTL 24h), rate limiting (sliding window), slot computation cache (TTL 5min with stale-while-revalidate), and pub/sub for real-time booking updates
Implement JWT-based auth with refresh token rotation, RBAC with roles [guest, customer, provider, admin], and Supabase Auth as identity provider with custom claims
Design real-time layer: Server-Sent Events for booking state updates, push notifications via Expo Push + Firebase, email via Resend/SendGrid
Create Nx monorepo structure: apps/mobile, apps/api, apps/admin-web, apps/provider-web, libs/shared-types, libs/ui, libs/api-client, libs/prisma-schema
Define CI/CD: GitHub Actions with pnpm caching, EAS Build for mobile, Docker multi-stage builds for API, automated Prisma migrations, and branch protection rules
Add comprehensive observability: structured logging with Pino, metrics with Prometheus, distributed tracing with OpenTelemetry, and health checks
Design file storage: Supabase Storage with signed URLs, image optimization pipeline, and CDN caching
Specify BullMQ queue architecture: separate queues for [notifications, payments, search-indexing, analytics, reminders], with dead-letter queues and exponential backoff

Must define Availability & Slot Computation data model and algorithm — this blocks booking flow, provider portal, and payment integration entirely
